resources.string: Sign in to access your dashboard
Your business account has been created successfully. Redirecting to your dashboard...
Enter your email to receive a verification code
Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email
Password must be at least 8 characters
No connection. Check your internet and try again.
Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
Failed to reset password. Please try again.
Reconnect to the internet, then try again to continue loading the app.
Use your PIN to unlock the merchant workspace.
Enter a 4-digit PIN for quick access
Enter your PIN again to confirm
Your PIN will be used for quick access to your business account. Make sure it\'s something you can remember.
Your PIN is encrypted and stored securely
Use your fingerprint or Face ID to unlock Verev.
Use your fingerprint or face for faster, more secure access
Your biometric data never leaves your device
No need to remember your PIN every time
Biometric data is stored securely on your device
Secure authentication for your business account
Biometric authentication failed. Use PIN or try again.
Are you sure you want to logout?\n\nYou\'ll need to enter your credentials again to access your account.
This email already belongs to an account. Sign in or recover your password.
Would you like to add staff members now and configure access before entering the app?
Review the team you added, create another staff member, or continue to the dashboard.
Create staff accounts for your branch before entering the dashboard.
Your business account is ready. Review the workspace once before entering the dashboard.
Securely verifying your account and preparing your workspace.
Setting up your business, owner profile, and default store.
Saving your PIN and authentication preferences securely.
Creating staff access and applying their branch permissions.
Preparing your account session and completing onboarding.
Enter your email and we\'ll send you a verification code
Enter your email and we\'ll send you a verification code
The reset link will expire in 24 hours. If you don\'t receive the email, check your spam folder or contact support.
Use the 6-digit code from your email to reset your password securely.
Use the 6-digit code from your email to reset your PIN securely.
Need help? Contact your business administrator.
We\'ve sent a PIN reset link to
Finish activating %1$s before entering the app.
This password was created by the business owner. Set your own password now to activate your staff profile.
Could not activate your profile right now.
Your password has been updated for
Your PIN has been updated for
Process customer visits, purchases, and rewards from one scan flow.
Connected to %1$s for checkout, rewards, and visit tracking
Use NFC bonus cards or scan a CODE_128 loyalty barcode linked to the customer loyalty ID.
How would you like to scan?
Select the method you use most at checkout. You can save it and skip this step next time.
Tap the customer card or phone to the back of the device.
Use the camera scanner for printed loyalty cards or wallet barcodes.
Member detected. Continue the loyalty flow or start a new scan.
Start a new scan when the customer is ready.
Hold the card or phone close to the device to read the loyalty ID.
Keep the NFC card close to your device until the scan completes
Keep the loyalty card steady near the device until the member is detected.
Matching the loyalty ID across your business locations and local customer records.
Use the active loyalty programs for this store to process the member instantly.
Visit check-in records a zero-value transaction and adds 10 loyalty points.
Visit check-in will apply %1$s based on the active local program.
Refresh the customer tier progress using current loyalty history.
No customer matched %1$s. Register the member in one step and continue the checkout.
The customer record and loyalty state were updated in the local database.
Review the scanned card, selected store, and entered values before retrying.
Hold the bonus card or wallet-enabled phone near the device.
Customer found. Choose the next loyalty action.
Customer not found for this loyalty card.
Unable to read a loyalty identifier from this scan.
This NFC tag does not contain a supported loyalty identifier. Try a registered bonus card or customer phone.
Barcode scan failed or was cancelled before a code was read.
That barcode or QR code does not match a supported Verev loyalty credential.
Camera access is required to scan loyalty barcodes on this screen.
The camera could not be started. Close other apps using the camera and try again.
No active scan actions are configured for this store.
Select a store before using the scan flow.
Unable to register the scanned customer.
Scan a customer before applying a loyalty action.
Sign in again before recording loyalty activity from the scan screen.
The redeem amount is below the minimum allowed for the active program.
The customer does not have enough points for that redemption.
The purchase amount is below the minimum spend required for cashback.
Couldn\'t look up the loyalty ID. Try scanning again.
Couldn\'t complete the loyalty action. Review the values and try again.
Enable loyalty actions from the Programs tab for this store.
What this customer can receive or do right now.
Check these unlocked benefits before finishing the customer interaction.
%1$d rewards are ready to hand over.
Allow camera access to scan loyalty barcodes directly in the scanner screen.
Create the profile first. Card delivery and access methods come right after.
Create the customer profile locally and generate an activation link instantly.
A universal loyalty ID will be generated immediately so the same member can be identified from NFC cards and barcodes.
Share the activation link with %1$s to connect their barcode or NFC loyalty card.
Hi %1$s, your Verev loyalty profile is ready. Open this link to activate it: %2$s
Select a store before adding a customer.
Unable to create the customer right now.
Please wait while team access and member details are updated.
Applying this branch staff change securely.
Saving store selection and branch configuration changes.
Updating the promotion and related payment configuration.
Preparing customers, promotions, and recent transaction data.
Finalizing the transaction and syncing loyalty effects securely.
Registering the customer and provisioning loyalty access.
Generating a secure wallet pass for this customer.
Hold the device steady while the loyalty credential is written.
Applying loyalty, CRM, and profile changes for this customer.
Preparing your business summary export and securing the file.
Syncing auto-report preferences and delivery settings.
Looking up the customer and available loyalty actions.
Processing the selected scan action and syncing loyalty updates.
Applying the selected plan and refreshing billing access.
Updating payment methods and billing preferences securely.
%1$d team members assigned to this business
Add staff members to delegate transactions and loyalty operations.
Create a new staff account for the selected business location.
Update staff details and store access for the selected business location.
The new account is now assigned to %1$s.
The new account is now assigned to %1$s.
The team member details were updated for %1$s.
The staff roster was refreshed for %1$s.
The team changes were applied successfully.
Current staffing split for the selected location
Enter a valid staff phone number with country code.
Temporary password must be at least 10 characters.
Temporary password must be at least 10 characters.
Select a business location before adding staff.
Unable to save the staff member right now.
Review the fields and try again. The selected store must remain active.
Remove %1$s from this business location and revoke access to transactions and loyalty tools.
Full access across analytics, programs, staff, and settings.
Full access except owner-level settings and team administration.
Front-desk access for transactions and assisted checkout only.
Limited daily access for customers and transaction support.
Generate business summaries for sharing and export
Sync the default export preferences used for scheduled and on-demand reporting.
Use all locations in one report
Only export the currently selected store
Download a polished report without leaving analytics.
Schedule recurring analytics emails for your team.
Keep your analytics delivered on a routine schedule.
Include all business branches in generated reports.
Unable to generate the report right now.
The generated file stays inside the app until you save it to a folder on your device.
Tap Open to view, or Save As to copy to another folder (e.g. Downloads).
Report saved to the selected location.
Could not save the report to the selected location.
Programs, reports, notifications, and staff access are ready for this branch.
Manage your marketing campaigns and special offers
We\'re preparing your latest store snapshot.
Transactions, customers, and loyalty activity will appear here.
Update the member identity and contact information.
Update customer CRM information and keep this profile accurate for the selected branch.
No notes saved for this customer.
Keep internal notes and segment tags organized for staff.
Record a signed points change with a clear audit reason.
No active program is available for this store.
This program does not add points from manual transactions.
Enter a valid email or leave it empty.
Apply a manual points adjustment and keep a clear audit reason.
%1$d access methods and reward channels are linked for this customer.
Use notes and current tier context before changing benefits or VIP handling.
No active tier program for this store yet.
%1$d point(s) for every %2$d spent. Minimum redeem: %3$d points.
This branch does not have local rewards configured yet.
Resolve same-person duplicates safely before they affect loyalty history.
Choose the correct customer record and preview what will move.
Move this business relationship into a clean customer profile.
Preview loaded. Enter the new identity details to continue.
This split needs platform support review first.
No extra warnings for this action.
This action is ready to apply.
Pick the surviving customer profile, review the impact, then confirm.
Search customer name, phone, or email
No matching customers found in this organization.
Points ledger entries on source profile: %1$d
Preview the organization data that will move into a new customer profile.
%1$d points required • %2$s reward is ready to redeem.
%1$d of %2$d rewards are currently redeemable for this customer.
Redeem %1$s for %2$d points? The customer currently has %3$d points.
Discount-based promotions will appear here once the branch launches them.
Record %1$s as applied for this customer?
Coupon-based programs or promo code campaigns will appear here.
%1$d points required • %2$s off is ready to redeem for orders above %3$s.
Redeem %1$s for %2$d points? The customer currently has %3$d points.
%1$d points required. %2$d more points to reach the next tier.
Customer is already at the highest available tier.
%1$d%% tier earning bonus is configured for higher-tier members.
This transaction could not be found in the local store history.
This transaction does not include a saved item breakdown.
Add a short reason so a manager can review this void request properly.
Enter a reason for this void request.
Couldn\'t submit the void request right now.
This completed purchase can be submitted for manager review.
A void request is waiting for approval.
The last void request was rejected. You can submit another request if needed.
This purchase has already been voided.
This transaction can no longer be voided from mobile.
Fetching customer profiles and loyalty details.
Register a customer to start building loyalty history.
Try a different search or loyalty tier filter.
No active tier program is available for this store yet.
Choose how the customer list should be ordered.
The selected customer could not be loaded.
This customer does not have transaction history yet.
Barcode, NFC, or wallet credentials will appear here.
Select a store to manage its loyalty programs.
%1$d scan actions are currently available from active programs.
Create a loyalty program to start rewarding repeat customers.
%1$d programs are currently available in live scan flows.
%1$d programs are configured to start later.
%1$d programs have ended and may need review.
%1$d programs are configured but currently disabled.
Configure points earning and reward redemption
Manage tier thresholds and VIP progress
Build coupon offers and redemption rules
Automate rewards for repeat purchase behavior
Configure referral incentives for both sides
Apply cashback credit with configurable spend thresholds
Combine points, check-ins, tiers, coupons, and referrals in one program
Manage points earning, welcome bonuses, and redemption thresholds.
Create a points-based rewards program for this branch.
Define Silver, Gold, and VIP progression for repeat customers.
Create a tier program to track customer loyalty status.
Configure coupon rewards, points costs, and spend thresholds.
Create a coupon-based reward for this branch.
Reward visits and stamp-style loyalty check-ins.
Create a check-in program to reward frequent visits.
Reward customers after a target number of purchases in a period.
Create a repeat-purchase reward program for this branch.
Manage referrer and referee incentives and code rules.
Create a referral program to reward customer growth.
Manage combined loyalty programs that mix points, check-ins, tiers, and coupon rewards.
Create a hybrid loyalty program for this branch.
Control whether this program appears in the live scan flow.
Allow staff to add purchase points during scans.
Allow reward redemption directly from scans.
Support scan-only visit check-ins without a purchase.
Apply cashback credit when a purchase is processed.
Expose tier progress tracking during scan flows.
Review the final setup before creating this program.
Live state, schedule, and reset timing
Set how customers qualify and what they receive from this program.
Choose where this program should be created. Multi-branch merchants start with all branches selected by default.
This program already exists in the locked branches below. You can add the same setup to more branches here.
Turn this off if the program should start only in selected branches.
Name the program, describe the member experience, and choose whether it is live.
Choose who can join this program. Leave filters broad if the program should work for everyone.
Can repeat for the same customer
Only customers in this age range can earn from this program.
Block repeat earning after the customer completes this program once.
The new program is now available in your programs dashboard.
Your changes are saved and the program is now using the updated setup.
The program was removed from this merchant workspace.
Select a store before configuring programs.
Set a min age, max age, or both.
Max age must be greater than or equal to min age.
Add a rules summary for staff reference.
Enable at least one scan action for the program.
Enter a valid percentage greater than zero.
Each tier threshold must be higher than the previous one.
Enter at least a 2-character referral prefix.
Couldn\'t save the loyalty program. Try again.
Couldn\'t remove the loyalty program. Try again.
Remove %1$s from this store? Existing transactions remain, but the program will no longer be available.
Run loyalty programs and manage the rewards customers can unlock.
Create saved rewards once, then attach them to any program when needed.
Add rewards after your loyalty program is configured.
Build the rewards your programs can unlock for customers.
Create a saved reward your programs can grant later.
Leave this off if the reward should stay available until you remove it.
A saved product or gift item you can give when a customer earns it.
A discount offer customers can redeem during checkout.
A saved product or gift item you can give when a customer earns it.
A one-off special offer for seasonal or targeted campaigns.
Inactive rewards stay visible in history but cannot be redeemed.
Remove %1$s from this branch? Existing redemptions remain in history.
Saving reward changes for this branch.
Select a branch before managing rewards.
Points required must be greater than zero.
Usage limit must be greater than zero.
Enter the expiration date as YYYY-MM-DD.
Add a product or offer image so staff can recognize it quickly.
Image added. Replace it if you want a clearer product or offer photo.
Use this for physical items so stock decreases automatically when the reward is given.
Stock updates automatically when staff gives this reward and you can adjust it here at any time.
Currently live in the selected store
Adjust the status filter or create a new campaign from the programs section.
Confirm and pay for network-wide visibility.
Confirm and pay for network-wide visibility
Review the campaign cost before confirming payment.
Choose how to pay for network visibility.
Wallet balance is not enough for this payment.
Your card will be securely saved for future payments
This promotion will be visible to all OneBonus members across the network. Customers from anywhere can discover and redeem this offer at your business location.
Set the campaign name, summary, and dates.
Choose the promotion type and the value shown to customers.
Decide who should see and redeem this promotion.
Control checkout availability and live status.
Allow this promotion to be used in checkout and payment flow.
Keep this promotion active for the selected store.
Remove %1$s from this store? The promotion will no longer be available at checkout.
Select a store before managing promotions.
End date must be after the start date.
Enter a promotion value greater than zero.
Describe the target segment for staff.
Couldn\'t save the promotion. Try again.
Couldn\'t remove the promotion. Try again.
Create a promotion to activate payment discounts or bonus point offers.
Customers earn %1$.1fx points while this promotion is active.
Customers see %1$d%% off when the promotion applies.
Customers receive %1$d AMD off when the promotion applies.
Customers receive %1$d bonus points when the promotion qualifies.
Customers receive a buy-one-get-one style offer when the basket qualifies.
Customers receive a free item when the promotion conditions are met.
Overlaps with campaign %1$s in the same date window and audience.
Stacks with loyalty program %1$s during the same branch period.
This offer targets %1$s and is configured as %2$s.
Once transactions are recorded, business insights will appear here.
Collecting store performance, customer trends, and revenue insights.
Top performers, highest value customers, and strongest promotion wins.
Revenue trends, order value, and daily performance
Promotion mix, payment offers, and campaign traction
Program mix, active rules, and scan action coverage
Productivity, revenue handling, and checkout throughput
Customer visits and signups across the selected range
Completed checkouts in the selected store
Offers with a future start date
Offers whose campaign window has closed
Revenue impact across the strongest campaigns
Member reach across your leading loyalty programs
Revenue mix, timing, and order value
ROI, usage, and payment promotion impact
Retained, reactivated, and churned customer mix
%1$s retained customers and %2$s inactive accounts need attention
Daily revenue performance across the selected range
Aggregated revenue across the selected periods
%1$s average promotion ROI across active campaigns
Staff productivity metrics will populate after transactions are processed.
%1$s handled by the leading team member this period
Revenue handled by the leading staff members
Manage your account and business settings
Manage your account and team preferences
Manage your account and business settings
Profile details used for this merchant login
Password, quick PIN, and device protection
Email, push, and in-app alert preferences
Business controls that affect stores, staff, and loyalty setup
Analytics visibility and export tools for performance tracking
Commercial and brand settings reserved for account owners
Legal, privacy, and account help information
Your current branch details, contact information, and schedule
Update your name, email, and phone number
Use this identity across your staff account
Manage login password, PIN, and biometric access
Configure email, push, and sound preferences for the local app
Approval requests, reports, customer activity, and system alerts will appear here.
Programs, approvals, staff activity, and other important merchant updates.
Global email, push, and sound preferences
That email address is already in use.
Set up a Quick PIN before enabling biometric login.
Store address, hours, and contact information
Update logo, colors, and visual identity
Are you sure you want to log out of your account?
Manage business locations and branch details.
Create a new local business location and prepare it for staff and loyalty setup.
Add the working schedule for this branch. You can paste a compact weekly schedule or start from a preset.
Update branch address, contact details, category, and operating hours.
Set this branch as the active working location.
Update branch address, contact details, and operating hours.
Enable or disable this branch for staff and customer operations.
Enter a valid branch phone number
Branch changes could not be saved.
Manage staff assigned to this branch.
Open branch-specific loyalty modules and program settings.
Select a branch before managing branch programs.
Check the branch selection and try again.
The branch staff list has been updated.
Add a manager, cashier, or staff member for this branch.
Update the password used to access your account
Must be at least 8 characters with letters and numbers
Manage PIN and biometric access for this device
Use a 4-digit code to unlock the app faster
Use fingerprint or Face ID on this device
Receive account and business updates by email
Show real-time alerts while using the app
Play a sound when a local notification appears
Choose which updates arrive by email
Control real-time alerts shown on this device
Global notification channels for email, push, and sound
Receive an email summary when local sales activity is recorded
Get a daily digest of local business performance
Receive campaign launch, discount, and promotion updates by email
Receive tips, feature updates, and campaign ideas
Receive weekly revenue, retention, and engagement highlights
Alert when a new customer profile is created
Alert for transaction activity while you are using the device
Alert when a customer redeems a reward or discount
Alert when loyalty programs or campaigns change locally
Alert for staff changes and management actions
Alert for sign-in, unlock, and account security events
Review business information, locations, and visual identity
Select a branch to review details and open its tools
Quick actions for the selected branch
Create another local branch and prepare it for loyalty and staff setup.
Review all branches, switch the active branch, and edit location details.
Manage staff assigned to the currently selected branch.
Open loyalty modules and program settings for the selected branch.
Manage plans, cards, and billing history
Billing changes sync securely with the backend and refresh across the merchant experience.
All payments are secured with 256-bit encryption.
Could not update the subscription plan.
Review billing history for the active business owner
Select a store to manage billing.
Could not update payment methods right now.
Invoice details could not be loaded.
Adjust colors and theme direction for your merchant app
Prepare a logo placeholder and keep brand colors consistent for the local build.
Upload a logo to preview your branch identity.
Primary card preview for your staff-facing experience
Review policy coverage and platform obligations
How customer and business data is protected
All merchant and customer records are stored locally for the MVP and protected with device-level access controls.
Sensitive account actions require authenticated access, and biometric unlock is optional per account.
Future sync can be introduced without changing the domain layer or invalidating existing local records.
What the platform stores to run loyalty operations
Store, staff, customer, transaction, and loyalty program records are stored offline in Room.
Billing and branding screens use local presentation state until payment-provider and asset-storage integration is added.
Analytics use aggregated local transactions so managers can operate with no network dependency.
Operational rules for using the merchant platform
Merchant accounts are role-based and should only be accessed by authorized staff assigned to a store.
Businesses are responsible for the accuracy of transaction, reward, and customer information entered into the app.
Offline records remain on-device until a future backend synchronization feature is introduced.
How account access and recovery are handled
PIN and biometric recovery flows are separated from merchant content so locked sessions do not expose dashboard data.
Session timeout and lock behavior are enforced in the app layer and remain consistent after backgrounding.
Recovery flows allow password reset from login and PIN reset from the lock screen without sharing navigation state.
Share a wallet invite to the customer
Use this CODE_128 barcode for barcode scanners and customer profile activation.
The barcode uses the customer\'s universal loyalty ID so the same member can be recognized from barcode, wallet barcode, and NFC card taps.
Save the customer loyalty pass to Google Wallet on this device, or use the share options below to deliver the activation link.
Google Wallet credentials are not configured yet. Add issuer credentials to local.properties to enable saving passes.
Checking whether Google Wallet pass save is available on this device...
Google Wallet is available on this device. You can save the loyalty pass now.
Google Wallet pass save is not available on this device right now.
Loyalty pass saved to Google Wallet.
Google Wallet could not save the pass. Check issuer configuration and device readiness.
Share the Wallet invite with the customer by email, SMS, or any messaging app. The customer must open it on their own phone.
Wallet issuer signing is not configured yet. The customer invite can still be shared, and real Wallet claim will be enabled once credentials are added.
Write the customer\'s universal loyalty identifier to a reusable NFC card.
The app writes only the loyalty activation link and loyalty ID to the NFC card. The tag stays rewritable. Personal profile data stays in the app database, not on the card.
Tap a writable NFC card to this device to write the loyalty card.
Writing customer loyalty data to the NFC card...
This NFC tag cannot store the loyalty card data. Try a different writable tag.
This NFC card is read-only and cannot be written.
This NFC card does not have enough capacity for the loyalty payload.
The app could not format the NFC card for loyalty data.
The app could not write the NFC loyalty card. Try again with another card.
All card methods use the same loyalty identity. Barcode, NFC, and Wallet can be linked over time without creating a second customer record.
Customer scans the code or opens the shared link on their own phone. The loyalty card is then added to their digital wallet flow.
Place a blank NFC card near your device and tap the button below
Hold a blank NFC card near your device
Keep the card close for 3-5 seconds
Give the programmed card to the customer
Hi %1$s, here is your Verev loyalty barcode card. Your loyalty ID is %2$s. Keep the attached barcode image and use this activation link when needed: %3$s
Hi %1$s, open this link on your own Android phone to continue setting up your Verev Wallet pass: %2$s
Your Verev loyalty card is ready
Hi %1$s, your physical Verev loyalty card is ready. Open this link to activate and sync it with your profile: %2$s
Issue or sync barcode, Google Wallet, and physical NFC access for this member. Every method stays linked to the same loyalty identity.
This customer does not have enough points for that reward.
This customer does not have enough points for that coupon.
Unable to record the discount action
Unable to record the tier benefit
Search customer by name, phone, email, or loyalty ID
Select a store with enrolled customers or add a customer first.
Enable a payment-flow promotion from the promotions module to apply it at checkout.
Customer has %1$d points. Up to %2$d can be applied.
Optional note shown in transaction history.
Select a store before recording transactions.
Cashier session is unavailable. Sign in again and retry.
Unable to save this transaction right now.
Add at least one valid line item.
Enter a valid number of points to redeem.
Redeemed points exceed the customer balance or sale total.
Completed checkouts for this store will appear here.
How this program works before you create it.
Create a program to see a live snapshot of the rules and reward structure here.
Define how customers collect value from purchases and visits.
Control when loyalty value can be redeemed during checkout.
Set cashback rate and the minimum spend needed to activate it.
Choose how much credit customers earn back from eligible purchases.
Choose how many visits a member must complete before a reward unlocks.
Set the visit target and choose what the member receives after reaching it.
After the visit goal, customer gets
Name the reward and define how much value it gives the member.
Define the coupon offer and the rules customers must meet to use it.
Set the points thresholds that move members through each tier.
Build the tier ladder, choose unlock thresholds, and add optional perks for each level.
Apply a bonus multiplier when a customer reaches a higher tier.
Describe the coupon reward the customer will redeem.
Control the points cost and spend threshold for the coupon.
Define how many purchases are needed and within what time window.
Set the repeat purchase target and choose what the customer receives after they hit it.
After the repeat purchase goal, customer gets
Reward both the inviting customer and the newly acquired customer.
Decide what the existing customer gets and what the new customer gets after a successful referral.
Set how customers collect points and when they can spend them.
Choose the prefix used when referral codes are generated for sharing.
Use a short, customer-facing title staff can recognize instantly.
Summarize how the program works in one sentence for staff reference.
Automatically make the program available only during a planned time window.
Pick the day the program should begin running automatically.
Pick the last day the program should stay active.
Reuse the same seasonal period every year.
Control when this program becomes active for staff and scan flows.
Choose when customer progress or eligibility resets for this program.
Runs whenever the program is enabled manually.
Select a valid start date for the automatic schedule.
Select a valid end date for the automatic schedule.
End date must be on or after the start date.
How much a customer must spend before another points block is awarded.
How many points are earned every time the spend step is reached.
Optional points given the first time a customer joins this program.
Staff cannot redeem below this points balance.
Percentage of the purchase returned as stored loyalty credit.
Only purchases above this amount earn cashback.
Points required before a member reaches Silver.
Points required before a member reaches Gold.
Points required before a member reaches VIP.
Extra points customers earn while they stay in this tier.
Discount customers receive while they stay in this tier.
Use the customer-facing label for this membership tier.
Spend or points required before a customer reaches this tier.
Points required before a customer reaches this tier.
Spend required before a customer reaches this tier.
Every customer starts here before qualifying for higher tiers.
The base tier always starts at 0 and does not add a bonus.
Customers move into the next tier when the total points they have collected in this program reaches the threshold below.
Set the name, entry threshold, and ongoing bonus for this level.
Choose an extra one-time benefit customers receive when they enter this tier.
Choose what customers receive after completing the visit goal.
Choose what customers receive after reaching the repeat-purchase goal.
Choose what the existing customer receives after a successful referral.
Choose what the new customer receives after joining through a referral.
Keep this compact here and configure the benefit in its own screen.
Add points directly to the customer balance.
Pick one saved reward item from your catalog.
Unlock an existing program as the benefit customers receive.
Create a reward first, then come back and select it as the benefit.
Create another program first, then select it here as the benefit.
%1$s pts every %2$s spent. Redeem starts at %3$s pts.
Existing customer gets %1$s. New customer gets %2$s. Code prefix: %3$s.
%1$s gives %2$s off and unlocks at %3$s points.
%1$s%% cashback is active for this program.
%1$d tiers. %2$s. Bonus range: %3$s. Tier perks: %4$d. First perk: %5$s.
The offer name staff will see when redeeming the coupon.
How many points are required before the coupon can be used.
The fixed discount value applied when the coupon is redeemed.
Optional minimum basket value required before the coupon can apply.
Number of check-ins needed before the reward unlocks.
Points granted when the required number of visits is reached.
Label staff will see when granting the check-in reward.
Number of purchases that must happen before the reward is triggered.
How many days the system should look back when counting purchases.
Points awarded when the purchase target is reached.
Internal label staff will see when the frequency reward becomes available.
Points granted to the existing customer who refers someone new.
Points granted to the newly referred customer.
Short prefix added before generated referral codes.
Enter a value greater than zero.
Add at least one tier above the base level.
Enter a name for this tier.
Enter a bonus percentage for this tier.
Customer earns %1$d points every %2$s and can redeem from %3$d points.
Customer climbs from Silver at %1$d to Gold at %2$d and VIP at %3$d points.
Add tier levels to define how members progress.
%1$s becomes redeemable once the customer reaches %2$d points.
After %1$d purchases in %2$d days, the customer receives %3$s.
Referrer receives %1$s and the new customer receives %2$s.
Credit points directly to the customer balance.
Use an existing discount reward from your reward catalog.
Pick a saved reward from your catalog. Its discount, product item, or promotion type is already defined there.
Use an existing free-product reward from your reward catalog.
Use an existing gift item from your reward catalog.

Pick one real reward from your reward catalog.

Staff will not see or apply this program until it is enabled again.

The configured date window ended on %1$s, so no live scan action is using it now.

This setup does not contribute any live checkout or check-in action for staff.
